text.p: INSTITUTION OF FEMALE STUDENT LEADERSHIP PRIZE IN THE FACULTY OF SCIENCE.
I would like to institute an annual Female Student Leadership Prize in my name in the Faculty of Science.

The Prize, to be called
Prize, will be awarded to the female graduating student with the best leadership quality in the Faculty and whose Class of Degree is not less than Second Upper Division (2:1). This award should commence in the 2008/2009 session.
I forward with this letter a First Bank of Nigeria cheque No for One hundred thousand naira (#100,000.00) only payable to the Bursar, OAU for the inauguration of the Leadership Prize.
I also forward copies of my Curriculum Vitae.
